message:
chore(gitignore): add agent build dirs and archived mailbox state patterns

Added three patterns for ephemeral files that were showing up as untracked:

- target_*/: Agent-named build directories (e.g. target_rosebison/)
- target-codex*/ broadened comment to cover agent variants
- **/archived_mailbox_states/: Debug mailbox state snapshot exports
  generated by the CLI's archive-nightly workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -69,8 +69,12 @@ test_logs/
 # Compiler crash reports
 rustc-ice-*.txt
 
-# Codex build artifacts
+# Codex/agent build artifacts
 target-codex*/
+target_*/
+
+# Archived mailbox state snapshots (ephemeral debug exports)
+**/archived_mailbox_states/
 
 # Ephemeral agent debug/test artifacts (accidental shell output)
 18
